title: 깃 명령어 외우던 시대는 끝났다 | 바이브 코딩 Git

style.imageSuffix: dark cinematic 3D render, modern developer workspace aesthetic, teal and amber rim lighting, shallow depth of field, volumetric glow, ultra detailed, no text, 16:9 cinematic

thumbnail.bgPrompt: extreme close-up of a stressed male developer's face half-lit by glowing red terminal error code reflected on his glasses, dark cinematic, intense worried expression, dramatic teal and red rim light

scenes.caption: 아직도 외우세요?
scenes.imagePrompt: a stressed software developer staring at a terminal full of red git error messages, hands on head, glowing monitor in a dark room

video.prompt: [Push in] the developer slowly leans back in frustration, screen glow flickering

scenes.narration: git reset, rebase, cherry-pick. 검색만 수십 번 해보셨을 겁니다.
scenes.caption: 검색 수십 번
scenes.imagePrompt: close-up of a screen with dozens of stackoverflow browser tabs open about git commands, reflection on developer glasses

scenes.narration: 그런데 요즘 잘나가는 개발자들은, 명령어를 외우지 않습니다.
scenes.caption: 외우지 않는다
scenes.imagePrompt: a confident relaxed developer leaning back with arms crossed, calm smile, sleek minimal desk, soft cinematic light

scenes.caption: 바이브 코딩
scenes.imagePrompt: a glowing neon hologram of an AI brain merging with flowing code streams above a keyboard, futuristic, cyber aesthetic

video.prompt: [Push in] the neon AI hologram pulses and code streams flow upward

scenes.narration: 원하는 걸 말로 설명하면, AI가 깃 명령어를 대신 실행해 줍니다.
scenes.caption: 말로 설명하면 끝
scenes.imagePrompt: a chat interface inside a code editor where a human types a request and an AI agent responds, glowing chat bubbles, modern IDE

scenes.narration: 예를 들어, 방금 커밋 되돌려줘, 라고 말하면.
scenes.caption: "되돌려줘"
scenes.imagePrompt: a speech bubble with a microphone icon floating over a dark terminal, sound waves, cinematic glow

scenes.caption: git revert 자동
scenes.imagePrompt: a terminal showing a successful git revert command with a bright green checkmark, particles of light, satisfying

scenes.narration: 머지 충돌이 나도 이제 걱정할 필요가 없습니다.
scenes.caption: 충돌? 걱정 끝
scenes.imagePrompt: two glowing code branches violently colliding with conflict markers and sparks in a dark space, dramatic

scenes.caption: 한마디면 끝
scenes.imagePrompt: an AI hand of light gently untangling two merging code streams into one clean flow, elegant, harmonious

scenes.caption: 브랜치 전략도
scenes.imagePrompt: a glowing 3D git branch graph floating in dark space, nodes and connecting lines of teal light, network visualization

scenes.narration: 기능별로 브랜치 나눠줘, 라고 하면 깔끔하게 정리됩니다.
scenes.caption: 깔끔하게 정리
scenes.imagePrompt: a perfectly organized clean git branch tree diagram glowing on a screen, symmetrical, minimal, satisfying order

scenes.narration: 핵심은, 명령어가 아니라 의도를 말하는 겁니다.
scenes.caption: 명령어 → 의도
scenes.imagePrompt: a human silhouette speaking, thought turning into glowing machine code, concept of intention becoming execution, cinematic

scenes.narration: 깃을 외우는 데 쓰던 그 시간을,
scenes.caption: 외우던 시간을
scenes.imagePrompt: an hourglass made of glowing code particles draining, time concept, dark moody background, cinematic

scenes.narration: 이제 진짜 중요한 코드에 쓸 수 있습니다.
scenes.caption: 진짜 코드에
scenes.imagePrompt: a developer triumphantly shipping a product, a rocket of light launching from a laptop screen, energetic, inspiring

scenes.narration: 물론, 기본 원리는 알고 있어야 합니다.
scenes.caption: 기본은 알아야
scenes.imagePrompt: a clean blueprint diagram of git internals with commits and pointers, soft warning amber tone, educational, schematic

scenes.narration: 커밋, 브랜치, 머지. 이 세 가지 개념만 잡으면,
scenes.caption: 커밋·브랜치·머지
scenes.imagePrompt: three glowing minimal icons representing commit, branch and merge floating in a row in dark space, clean, iconic

scenes.caption: 나머진 AI가
scenes.imagePrompt: an AI filling in missing glowing puzzle pieces of a larger code structure, completion, harmony, teal glow

scenes.narration: 다음 편에서 실전 셋업까지 이어집니다. 지금 바로 따라 해보세요.
scenes.caption: 지금 따라하기
scenes.imagePrompt: a glowing forward arrow and a rising path of light leading into the distance, next chapter concept, premium dark cinematic studio background, particles, no text
